name: DocuSign eSignature
description: DocuSign eSignature is an electronic signature platform for sending, signing, and managing documents and agreements. The REST API provides programmatic access to create and send envelopes (signature requests), manage recipients, work with templates, track envelope status, download signed documents, and manage account settings.

capabilities.name: envelope_create
capabilities.description: Create and optionally send an envelope (signature request) with documents and recipients.

capabilities.name: envelope_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the status and details of a specific envelope.

capabilities.name: envelope_list
capabilities.description: List envelopes with filtering by status, date range, and search criteria.

capabilities.name: envelope_update
capabilities.description: Update an envelope's status (e.g., send a draft, void a sent envelope).

capabilities.name: envelope_documents_get
capabilities.description: Download the documents from an envelope as PDF.

capabilities.name: envelope_documents_list
capabilities.description: List all documents within an envelope.

capabilities.name: envelope_recipients_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the recipients and their signing status for an envelope.

capabilities.name: envelope_recipients_update
capabilities.description: Update recipients on an envelope (add, modify, or delete).

capabilities.name: envelope_audit_events_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the audit trail of events for an envelope.

capabilities.name: template_list
capabilities.description: List available templates in the account.

capabilities.name: template_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific template.

capabilities.name: envelope_create_from_template
capabilities.description: Create and send an envelope using a pre-defined template.

capabilities.name: folder_items_get
capabilities.description: List envelopes in a specific folder.
